meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: Claude Code Skills Setup: How Students Build Advanced Apps
content.seo_description: Stop building basic apps. Learn how to master Claude Code skills setup and Antigravity to scale your engineering workflow and land your first dev role.
content.answer_block: To break past basic app limitations, integrate Claude Code with Antigravity to automate architectural scaffolding and complex logic. By treating AI as a pair-programmer, you shift from syntax-focused coding to system-design thinking, allowing you to build production-grade applications that demonstrate senior-level engineering competence to potential employers.
content.intro:
You know the feeling: you’ve finished the tutorials, built the to-do list, and mastered the basic CRUD app. Yet, when you sit down to build something 'real' for your portfolio, the blank screen feels like an insurmountable wall. You are trapped in the shallow end of development, where every complex feature feels like a mountain you aren't equipped to climb.

The secret isn't more tutorials; it's changing your leverage. By configuring Claude Code with Antigravity, you move from typing code manually to orchestrating systems. This isn't just a setup guide; it's a transition from student to architect, allowing you to bridge the gap between 'code that runs' and 'software that scales.'

steps.title: Environment Scaffolding
steps.description: Initialize a robust project structure that enforces clean architecture from line one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the requirements for a full-stack SaaS MVP and generate a directory structure that follows industry-standard clean architecture patterns.

steps.title: Contextual Knowledge Injection
steps.description: Feed your project constraints into the AI so it doesn't hallucinate irrelevant libraries.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scan the current project requirements and create a .claude_ignore and context file that focuses only on modern React and Node.js best practices.

steps.title: Automated Logic Refactoring
steps.description: Convert your brittle, basic logic into modular, testable service components.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the existing authentication logic into a modular service class with proper dependency injection.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'refactor auth logic into modular services'

steps.title: Integration Testing Suite
steps.description: Ensure your app doesn't break when you add features by generating automated tests.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a comprehensive test suite using Vitest for the user registration flow, covering edge cases and error handling.

steps.title: Deployment Pipeline Orchestration
steps.description: Bridge the final gap between local development and a live, production-ready environment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions CI/CD configuration that automates building, testing, and deploying to Vercel.

pro_tips: Always define your 'Definition of Done' in the Antigravity prompt to prevent the AI from over-engineering simple features.
Use Claude Code's memory feature to store coding style preferences so your codebase maintains a consistent 'human' voice.
Break large tasks into sub-tasks using the CLI's --plan mode; never ask for an entire feature in one shot.
Review the AI's diffs manually before accepting changes; treating it like a junior dev ensures you maintain control.
Leverage the .clauderc file to hardcode your project's technical stack, saving you from repeating it in every session.
content.next_steps: Once your environment is set up, focus on building a 'Hard-to-Replace' feature, such as real-time data synchronization or complex state management, to solidify your portfolio.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting syntax hold you back from your potential. The tools are ready, the architecture is clear, and your next project is waiting to be deployed. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
